_doc: Hand-transcribed whole statements for partitions whose statement PAGE is a scanned image (no text layer) — the deterministic extractor cannot read them and OCR is out of scope. Applied by scripts/load_partition.py: the PDF is re-extracted for the text statements (assets, P&L), then the statements listed here REPLACE the empty/image ones. Each row: hierarchy h, name, amount_tl tl, amount_fc fc, amount_total total (current period; blanks = 0, parens = negative). Every statement here is validated to 0 failures before push (TL+FC=Total, parent=Σchildren, Σromans=TOTAL, assets total = liabilities total).
